title: Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Karnataka India, aimed for the protection of chinkaras (Indian Gazelle).
overview.description: Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Karnataka India, aimed for the protection of chinkaras (Indian Gazelle). Established in 2016, it is the first chinkara sanctuary in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Yadahalli, Bilagi
topPlaces.description: Yadahalli is a panchayat village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. Administratively, Yadahalli is under Bilagi Taluka of Bagalkot District in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Galagali
topPlaces.description: Galagali is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located on the banks of river Krishna in the Bilgi taluk of Bagalkot district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Amalazari
topPlaces.description: Amalazari is a village in Taluka Bilagi, district Bagalkot, in the state of Karnataka in India. The population of the village was 4011 as of 20 January 2017.

topPlaces.name: Kishori
topPlaces.description: Kishori is a village in Mudhol, Bagalkot district, Karnataka, India. It is situated 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from the sub-district headquarters at Mudhol and 55 kilometres (34 mi) from its district headquarters at Bagalkot.

topPlaces.name: Mantur
topPlaces.description: Mantur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mudhol taluk of Bagalkot district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Teggi
topPlaces.description: Teggi is a panchayat village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. Administratively, Teggi is under Bilagi Taluka of Bagalkot District in Karnataka.

Kishori is a village in Mudhol, Bagalkot district, Karnataka, India. It is situated 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from the sub-district headquarters at Mudhol and 55 kilometres (34 mi) from its district headquarters at Bagalkot.
Mantur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mudhol taluk of Bagalkot district in Karnataka.
Teggi is a panchayat village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. Administratively, Teggi is under Bilagi Taluka of Bagalkot District in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (106 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Yadahalli Chinkara Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yadahalli, Bilagi, Galagali, Amalazari, Kishori, Mantur.
